summary.inferred_tier_note: Two inferred-tier rows: China Equities N (L230/L243-245) and Data Centers O (L502-504). Both have verbatim spans, are plausible single-step inferences (country-macro sentiment->equity view; capex-flow->stance), are NOT hallucinations, and are correctly segregated with basis=inferred and review flags. China Equities is the more generous of the two (the doc makes no explicit China-equity call) but remains grounded and properly caveated.
summary.headline: GSAM's breadth is SOUND, not overreach: 0 of 31 model_only rows are overreach. ~20 rows are faithful enumerations of the p.12 'Market Solutions' grid (each leaf is a printed, named favored solution) and the remaining ~11 quote explicit thematic prose (Key Takeaways conviction, modular-equities tilts, private-markets segments) verbatim. The dominant pattern is systematic grid-expansion the GT simply did not enumerate (GT kept only 9 high-conviction thematic leaves). The one methodological caveat is horizon/conditionality flattening: the model calls every grid cell 'O' including scenario-hedge (Key-Upside/Downside-Risks column) items like Short Duration, Core FI, High Dividend, and Dollar-Positive that are tail-risk hedges rather than unconditional overweights, and the USD 'N' arguably under-reads a slight dollar-negative tilt to 'U' - a per-cell generosity, not a fabrication.
